title: Trump says Xi offered help on Iran — but how far is Beijing willing to go?
summary_full: Trump said in an interview that Xi told him he "would like to be of help" in efforts to resolve the conflict in the Middle East.
summary_public: Trump said in an interview that Xi told him he "would like to be of help" in efforts to resolve the conflict in the Middle East.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: resolve the conflict in the Middle East
